Appearances:
Plaintiff Mahmooda Bhimjee is NOT present. *stipulation is signed my the party*
Attorney Isaac Jacobson for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kim Moore is present.
Attorney Zeenat Hassan appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of February 14, 2017 is vacated. (501)
